title: mangifera decandra
intro: Mangifera decandra, also known as the Indian horse mango or the twelve-angled mango, is a plant species that belongs to the family Anacardiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to treat digestive issues and fever. The health benefits of Mangifera decandra include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antimicrobial agent. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make various extracts and decoctions, including a tincture that can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
